name: megapowers
description: An opinionated, à-la-carte collection of skills, plugins, and hooks for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Antigravity. One maintainer's workflow, not a universal framework.

plugins.name: megapowers
plugins.description: The workflow core: process skills for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, worktrees, and subagent orchestration. A restyled fork of Superpowers.

plugins.name: mega-go
plugins.description: Greenfield Go: an opinionated stack picker plus idiomatic Go patterns.

plugins.name: mega-python
plugins.description: Greenfield Python: an opinionated stack picker (uv, ruff, pyright, pytest, FastAPI) plus idiomatic Python patterns.

plugins.name: mega-ts
plugins.description: Greenfield TypeScript: an opinionated stack picker (pnpm, strict tsconfig, vitest, Hono, zod) plus idiomatic TypeScript patterns.

plugins.name: mega-orchestration
plugins.description: Decide the structure (inline, fan-out, delegate, best-of-N, council, autonomous run), route each role to the best model, verify across vendors, and gate irreversible actions.

plugins.name: mega-guardrails
plugins.description: Safety hooks and dev tooling: block destructive commands, auto-format on save, and a rich statusline (Linux-only, opt-in).

plugins.name: mega-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend design guidance: distinctive visual direction, typography, layout, and UX copy that don't read as templated defaults.
